## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)

## Checklist before merging

- [ ] Tests and docs added or updated as needed
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/)
- [ ] Commits are signed
